title: Where was the Statue of Liberty made?

meanings.usage: 指为纪念重要人物或事件而建造的建筑物
一种红棕色的金属材料
支撑或构成某物的基本结构
雕像、柱子等下面的支撑基座
使某物直立或建立起来
代表某种意义或思想的符号
个人或群体的自由权利
将人或物从一地运送到另一地
船只停泊和装卸货物的水域
强调某事物的重要性或特殊性

phrases.usage: 表示完成某事花费了多长时间

examples.en: The project took ten years to complete.
examples.zh: 这个项目花了十年才完成。

phrases.usage: 表示由某种材料制成（能看出原材料）

examples.en: The statue was made of copper.
examples.zh: 这座雕像是用铜制成的。

examples.en: It was taken to pieces and sent to America.
examples.zh: 它被拆成零件运往美国。

examples.en: The statue had been put together again.
examples.zh: 雕像已经被重新组装起来。

examples.en: Ever since then, it has been a symbol of liberty.
examples.zh: 从那以后，它就一直是自由的象征。

examples.en: It was officially presented to the American people.
examples.zh: 它被正式赠送给了美国人民。

examples.en: The statue is a symbol of liberty.
examples.zh: 这座雕像是自由的象征。

examples.en: People who have made their homes in America.
People who have passed through New York Harbour.
An island at the entrance of New York Harbour.
examples.zh: 纽约港入口处的一个岛屿。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作，常与by+过去时间或before/after连用
grammar.usage: 描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时

examples.en: The framework had been especially constructed by Eiffel.
examples.zh: 框架是由埃菲尔特别建造的。

examples.en: By 1884, a statue had been erected in Paris.
examples.zh: 到1884年，一座雕像已在巴黎竖立。

grammar.title: 过去完成进行时 (Past Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时间之前一直在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 强调动作的持续性和未完成性

examples.en: It has been a symbol of liberty for millions of people.
examples.zh: 它一直是数百万人民的自由象征。

grammar.title: 非限制性定语从句 (Non-restrictive Relative Clause)
grammar.definition: 用逗号分隔，对先行词进行补充说明，去掉后不影响主句意思
grammar.structure: 名词/代词, which/who + 陈述语序
grammar.usage: 常用于描述人物、建筑等，补充额外信息

examples.en: The great statue, which was designed by the sculptor Auguste Bartholdi, took ten years to complete.
examples.zh: 这座伟大的雕像由雕塑家奥古斯特·巴托尔迪设计，花了十年才完成。

sentencePatterns.pattern: One of the most + 形容词最高级 + 可数名词复数...

original.en: One of the most famous monuments in the world, the Statue of Liberty...
original.zh: 世界上最著名的纪念碑之一——自由女神像...

imitations.en: One of the most beautiful cities in the world is Paris.
imitations.zh: 世界上最美丽的城市之一是巴黎。

imitations.en: One of the most important inventions of the 20th century is the computer.
imitations.zh: 20世纪最重要的发明之一是电脑。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The + 名词, which + 非限制性定语从句...

original.en: The great statue, which was designed by the sculptor Auguste Bartholdi, took ten years to complete.
original.zh: 这座伟大的雕像由雕塑家奥古斯特·巴托尔迪设计，花了十年才完成。

imitations.en: The book, which was written by a famous author, became a bestseller.
imitations.zh: 这本书是由一位著名作家写的，成了畅销书。

imitations.en: The tower, which was built in the 19th century, attracts many tourists.
imitations.zh: 这座塔建于19世纪，吸引了许多游客。

sentencePatterns.pattern: By + 过去时间, + 主语 + 过去完成时...

original.en: By 1884, a statue which was 151 feet tall had been erected in Paris.
original.zh: 到1884年，一座151英尺高的雕像已在巴黎竖立。

imitations.en: By 2020, the building had been completed.
imitations.zh: 到2020年，这座建筑已经完工。

imitations.en: By the end of last month, we had finished the project.
imitations.zh: 到上个月底，我们已经完成了这个项目。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Ever since then, + 主语 + has/have been + 过去分词...

original.en: Ever since then, the great monument has been a symbol of liberty.
original.zh: 从那以后，这座伟大的纪念碑一直是自由的象征。

imitations.en: Ever since then, she has been a teacher.
imitations.zh: 从那以后，她一直是一名教师。

imitations.en: Ever since then, this place has been my home.
imitations.zh: 从那以后，这个地方一直是我的家。
